data.description: Xeriant (referred to as OTCQB: XERI) has garnered significant attention from major manufacturers in various sectors, expressing interest in incorporating its proprietary technology.

data.title: White Castle Inducted 14 of Its Most Passionate Fans Into the 2025 Class of Its Prestigious Cravers Hall of Fame
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, fourteen dedicated White Castle fans were honored at the White Castle Cravers Hall of Fame induction ceremony at the company's headquarters. This marks the 25th class of inductees, bringing the total number of passionate Cravers in the Hall of Fame to 301. The prestigious honor is bestowed upon individuals who show exceptional loyalty and love for White Castle. The newest members of the Class of 2025 now join the ranks of the 287 previously inducted Cravers.

data.title: Ford Appoints Maria Ricciardone Chief Investor Relations Officer
data.description: In DEARBORN, Mich., Ford Motor Company has appointed Maria Ricciardone as the new chief investor relations officer, starting on May 1. Formerly serving as the vice president, treasurer, and investor relations at Lockheed Martin, Ricciardone takes over from Lynn Antipas Tyson. Tyson will move into a senior advisory position, reporting to CFO Sherry House. Ricciardone's background includes significant expertise in financial strategy, planning, and capital allocation. This change aims to enhance Ford's investor relations team with the influx of Ricciardone's experience.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee/
data.description: The American-Arab Anti-Discrimination Committee filed a motion on 29-Apr-2026 to intervene in support of Medford's Landmark Values-Aligned Investment Ordinance. This ordinance aims to promote ethical investments that align with the city's values. The committee's intervention is in defense of this ordinance. The news release did not mention the specific changes made, but it highlights the importance of the ordinance and the committee's support for it. This development signifies a significant step towards enforcing responsible investment practices within Medford.

data.title: Ideal Power to Host First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call on May 14, 2026 at 10:00 AM Eastern Time
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 30, 2026, Ideal Power Inc. (Nasdaq: IPWR) disclosed their development of the B-TRAN® bidirectional semiconductor power switch. The company stated they will hold a management conference to discuss this innovation.

data.title: SiriusXM Controls Churn, Ends With 33 Million Total Subscribers (CORRECTED)
data.description: In its first-quarter 2026 financial report, Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI) displayed strong subscriber loyalty. The company generated quarterly sales of $2.091 billion, surpassing the estimated $2.070 billion and marking an increase from $2.068 billion in the previous year. Earnings per share were reported at 72 cents, exceeding the analyst projection of 67 cents and showing growth from 59 cents compared to the previous year. Net income saw a significant surge to $245 million, representing a 20% increase. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com with corrected earnings per share information.

data.title: Why This CEO Is Confident His Drug Can Top 'Unprecedented' Pancreatic Cancer Results
data.description: The stock of Tango Therapeutics has experienced significant growth this year due to its collaboration with Revolution Medicines in developing a treatment for pancreatic cancer. The CEO is optimistic about the success of their drug, as it has shown promising results in treating this aggressive form of cancer. The partnership aims to build on the 'unprecedented' outcomes achieved so far in pancreatic cancer treatment. The positive developments have attracted investor interest, leading to a notable increase in Tango Therapeutics' stock value.

data.title: War Hero Col. Jack Jacobs Brings Battle Lessons To Boardroom
data.description: In his early twenties, Col. Jack Jacobs discovered a crucial lesson during a challenging battle: the importance of taking immediate action. Now a war hero, he brings this valuable battle-tested wisdom to the corporate boardroom. This story showcases how Col. Jack Jacobs' experiences have shaped his perspective and instincts, offering valuable insights for business executives.

data.title: CAT Stock Powers Dow Jones On Fastest Growth Since '21
data.description: Revenue in the construction segment experienced a significant increase of 38%. This surge in revenue has propelled CAT stock, contributing to the Dow Jones registering its fastest growth since 2021.

data.title: Amazon Stock Climbing After Q1 Results. Why Tech Giant's AI Commentary Reversed An Initial Slide.
data.description: On Thursday, Amazon's stock surged following the release of their first-quarter results, which surpassed expectations. The tech giant's strong performance led to a reversal of an initial slide in their AI commentary. This positive news had a significant impact on investors, showcasing Amazon's resilience and potential for growth in the market.

data.title: Valero Energy Earnings Skyrocket As Crack Spreads Soar Amid Iran War
data.description: Valero reported a substantial increase in earnings during the first quarter, with profits more than quadrupling. This surge was fueled by a significant rise in refining crack spreads, which occurred amid tensions surrounding the conflict involving Iran. The company's strong financial performance was highlighted as its earnings soared amidst these favorable market conditions.
Key shareholder reveals significant stake in company, holding 15% of total shares.
